title: CG Reborn
description: A modpack focused around rotational power and completely movable bases
body:
# CG Reborn

![A cove of Eureka ships](https://i.ibb.co/BNTys33/image.png)

The main focus of the modpack is Create - allowing the user to create fancy and aesthetic contraptions to automate there world, with the additional twist that a play could build their entire base on a ship from valkyrie skies' Eureka, allowing for working airships and boats, with mounted Create Big Cannon's and all the farms you could ask for, but floating!

## Spaceflight
Ad Astra is present in the modpack, to allow for further exploration into space, however using Create Craft's and Addons, it is likely your best power source is rotation, converted to energy using an alternator.


## Magic
This pack also has a few magic mods to enrich your exerience, want to replace the walls of your base? use a wand of shifting crusts from Botania!


## Notes
Note: This modpack utlises vs-clockwork to allow for rendering of Create contraptions on Eureka ships, the rest of the content should not be used as it is in early alpha (Licenced under Apache 2.0)

Because of various interactions, a slightly older version of Big Cannons that is not present on modrinth is used, as Create 0.5.0i is used instead of the latest version.
